name: easiviotech/fabriq-skeleton
description: Fabriq starter project — a ready-to-use scaffold for building Swoole-powered SaaS applications with multi-tenancy, realtime WebSockets, background jobs, and per-tenant frontend serving.

suggest.fabriq/streaming: Live streaming add-on (WebRTC, HLS transcoding, chat moderation)
suggest.fabriq/gaming: Game server add-on (tick loop, matchmaking, UDP protocol, state sync)

post-create-project-cmd:
@php -r "echo '
\033[32m✓ Fabriq skeleton installed.
  Next: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build
\033[0m';"
